_comment: OAuth configuration example for CList. This file documents the OAuthProviders structure defined in js/oauth-config.js. Copy and modify js/oauth-config.js to add new providers.

Mastodon.name: Mastodon
Mastodon._note: Mastodon registers a new app per instance. client_id is cached in localStorage per instance+redirectUri. No static clientId needed.

_example_github._note: Example for a provider with a fixed client_id (not Mastodon). Add to OAuthProviders in oauth-config.js.
_example_github.name: GitHub

launcher._note: Launcher kvstore URL can be set via --kvstore argument or CLIST_KVSTORE_URL environment variable.
